name: Collapse
description: Animate presence with slide down/up transition
searchText: collapse animate presence with slide down/up transition @mantine/core /core/collapse animateopacity expanded keepmounted ontransitionend ontransitionstart orientation transitionduration transitiontimingfunction

props.name: animateOpacity
props.description: Determines whether the opacity is animated

props.name: keepMounted
props.description: If set, the element is kept in the DOM when collapsed. When true, React 19 Activity is used to preserve state while collapsed. When false, the element is unmounted after the exit animation.
